children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: a .—Authority
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may provide, by contract or otherwise, necessary salvage facilities for public and private vessels.

children.heading: .—Coordination With Secretary of Homeland Security
children.label: b .—Coordination With Secretary of Homeland Security
children.text: The Secretary shall submit to the Secretary of Homeland Security for comment each proposed contract for salvage facilities that affects the interests of the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: c .—Limitation
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may enter into a term contract under subsection (a) only if the Secretary determines that available commercial salvage facilities are inadequate to meet the requirements of national defense.

children.heading: .—Public Notice
children.label: d .—Public Notice
children.text: The Secretary may not enter into a contract under subsection (a) until the Secretary has provided public notice of the intent to enter into such a contract.

children.heading: .—Salvage Facilities Defined
children.label: e .—Salvage Facilities Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “salvage facilities” includes equipment and gear utilized to prevent, abate, or minimize damage to the environment.
